_note: Covers the full routing pipeline: Scaffold.route is the @app.route decorator entry point; Scaffold/App.add_url_rule handle registration; App.create_url_adapter binds url_map to requests; AppContext.match_request performs URL matching; Flask.url_for and module-level url_for handle reverse URL generation; View.as_view and MethodView provide class-based routing. Verified by grep in src/flask/ at 2ac8988.
